title: 7 Herbal Teas For Dehydration
description: Echinacea purpurea teas contains bioactive constituents like polysaccharides, alkylamides, and caffeic acid derivatives. These compounds have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce oxidative stress in the body, making them beneficial for dehydration. The polysaccharides in Echinacea purpurea teas stimulate the production of hyaluronic acid, which is essential for maintaining fluid balance in the body.
